MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONERS MERRILL LYNCH, PIERCE, FENNER & SMITH INCORPORATED, AMIR MARTIN and ILEANA DOMINGEUZ Petition To Confirm Arbitration Aweard. Granted. No opposition filed. Order and judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
